news.t: UPDATE - Tidal Trust II Announces Name Change of STKD Bitcoin & Gold ETF
Tidal Trust II Announces Name Change of STKD Bitcoin & Gold ETF
Fund issuer Stacked (STKD) launches Bitcoin and Gold ETF
New ETF Combines Digital and Physical Currency, Provides 100% Exposure to Bitcoin & 100% Exposure to Gold

overview.description: The STKd 100% Bitcoin & 100% Gold ETF (BTGD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides combined exposure to Bitcoin and gold through futures contracts and ETPs. The fund uses leverage to stack the total return of its Bitcoin holdings with the potential returns of the gold strategy. BTGD was launched on Oct 15, 2024 and is issued by Stacked.

data.text: CHICAGO, Feb. 11, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Tidal Trust II today announced that the STKD Bitcoin & Gold ETF (BTGD) will undergo a name change to STKd 100% Bitcoin & 100% Gold ETF, effective February 18...

data.title: MSTR & Bitcoin's Crypto Link, Gold & Crypto ETFs to Watch
data.text: Cinthia Murphy discusses everything crypto with Oliver Renick. She talks about how investors are seeking diversification with gold and bitcoin ETFs and talk about themes continuing into next year.

data.title: Tidal CEO on the decision to file for a two-stock ETF
data.text: Michael Venuto, founder and CIO of Tidal, joins CNBC's Bob Pisani on Halftime Report to discuss the firm's decision to file for two-stock ETFs and how the pairs trade strategy works.

data.title: Fund issuer Stacked (STKD) launches Bitcoin and Gold ETF
data.text: Stacked, a fund issuer commonly referred to as STKD, has introduced a new exchange-traded fund (ETF) designed to offer leveraged exposure to Bitcoin (BTC) and gold, responding to growing investor inte...

data.title: New ETF Combines Digital and Physical Currency, Provides 100% Exposure to Bitcoin & 100% Exposure to Gold
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Quantify Funds launches the STKD Bitcoin & Gold ETF (BTGD), “stacking” exposures to bitcoin and gold for potential excess returns, diversification.
